title: IBKR Adaptive Algo Order Router
summary: Replace all current market order submissions with IBKR's Adaptive Algo using 'Patient' priority setting. The Adaptive Algo uses IBKR's SmartRouting to trade between the bid-ask spread rather than crossing it, which directly reduces transaction costs at entry and exit. For Decifer, this is a one-parameter change in the IBKR API order object that requires near-zero architectural change.
expected_impact: Estimated 2–8 bps improvement per fill vs plain market orders; IBKR states 'on average leads to better fill prices than regular market or limit orders' — on 100 trades/month at $5k average, that is $10–$40/month in saved slippage
